PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 5, 6 or 7 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: If the triggering game has 5 Free Spins symbols, the win multiplier in the free spins then starts at x1 and every free spin increases the multiplier by 1.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: If the triggering game has 6 Free Spins symbols, the win multiplier in the free spins then starts at x2 and every free spin increases the multiplier by 2.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: If the triggering game has 7 Free Spins symbols, the win multiplier in the free spins then starts at x3 and every free spin increases the multiplier by 3.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: The maximum multiplier value achievable is x150.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: 5 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 12 more free spins.
PhoenixRisesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

PhoenixRisesRules.GeneralRules1: Phoenix Rises is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Free Spins Feature with increasing multipliers up to x150.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

PhoenixRisesRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
